sections.category: LLM Workflow > OpenClaw / NemoClaw / Hermes Agents

bullets.body: **Hermes Agent v0.11.0 "Interface" (4/23, traction 4/25-27) — buong React/Ink TUI rewrite, native AWS Bedrock, GPT-5.5 via Codex OAuth, 1,556 commits / 761 PRs / 224K insertions / 29 contributors** — Pinakamalaking Hermes Agent release hanggang sa kasalukuyan. **Ink-based interactive CLI** (`hermes --tui`) na may Python JSON-RPC backend (`tui_gateway`); sticky composer; live streaming na may OSC-52 clipboard support; stable picker keys; status bar na may per-turn stopwatch + git branch; `/clear` confirm; light-theme preset; subagent-spawn observability overlay. **Pluggable transport architecture sa ilalim ng bawat provider**; 5 bagong inference paths; ika-17 messaging platform (QQBot); native AWS Bedrock; GPT-5.5 via Codex OAuth. **Shell hooks** (`pre_tool_call` / `post_tool_call` / `on_session_start`) nang walang Python plugin. **Webhook direct-delivery mode** (zero-LLM push para sa alerts, uptime, event streams). Subagents na may explicit orchestrator role + configurable `max_spawn_depth`; concurrent sibling subagents na nagsa-share ng filesystem state via file-coordination layer. May per-task overrides screen para sa auxiliary models.
**Hermes Agent v0.11 reference guide — Ink TUI + Bedrock + GPT-5.5 deployment** — Practitioner write-up ng v0.11.0 surface area para sa production self-hosters.

citations.label: Blake Crosley - Hermes Agent v0.11 Reference: Ink TUI + Bedrock + GPT-5.5

bullets.body: **Tuluy-tuloy ang OpenClaw v2026.4.25-beta train hanggang 4/27 — voice-stack hardening, browser-automation safe-tab URLs, CDP-native role-snapshot fallback, CLI image-gen --background, Discord voice channel model override, plugin-onboarding install-record preservation** — Tuluy-tuloy ang sub-24h beta cadence mula 4/26 13:00 (beta.3) → 13:24 (beta.4) → beta.7+ hanggang sa working hours ng 4/27. Production-shaped na ang voice reply na may chat-scoped auto-TTS controls + personas + 6 TTS providers (Azure Speech / Xiaomi / Local CLI / Inworld / Volcengine / ElevenLabs v3).

citations.label: newreleases.io - openclaw/openclaw v2026.4.25-beta.4

bullets.body: **NemoClaw — tuluy-tuloy ang early-preview status, NVIDIA OpenShell + 5-layer security architecture** — Available ang NemoClaw sa early preview mula 3/16/2026; **5 stacked layers sa pagitan ng OpenClaw agent at host**: NVIDIA OpenShell secure runtime bilang policy-enforcement broker, sandboxed execution, network egress control, minimal-privilege access, privacy routing, intent verification.

citations.label: NVIDIA - Run Autonomous, Self-Evolving Agents More Safely with NVIDIA OpenShell

bullets.body: **Inakusahan ni Sam Altman ang Anthropic ng "fear-based marketing" para sa Mythos — lumalala ang debate sa 4/25-27** — Altman: "We have built a bomb, we are about to drop it on your head. We will sell you a bomb shelter for $100 million." Linggo matapos kumpirmahin ng Bloomberg na nakakuha ng access ang isang private Discord forum sa Mythos sa pamamagitan ng third-party Anthropic contractor + URL-pattern guessing.

bullets.body: **CNBC: Lumalamig ang public sa AI at datacenters habang papunta sa IPO ang Anthropic at OpenAI at patuloy ang gastos ng tech (4/15, traction 4/25-27)** — Public-opinion data mula sa IPO window: lumalalang backlash + physical-attack incidents (bahay ni Altman, 4/16) ang nag-frame sa cap-ex narrative.

**Walang major release sa loob ng 4/25-27 — tuluy-tuloy ang v0.19.1 (4/18); ang v0.20 framing (Transformers v5 broad rollout, FA4 default MLA prefill backend, TurboQuant 2-bit KV-cache, Online Quantization Frontend, vLLM IR scaffold) ay anticipated pa rin** — Inaasahan ang vLLM v0.20 na palawakin ang Transformers v5 compatibility, isulong ang speculative-decoding maturity, at magdagdag ng MoE routing optimizations para sa Gemma 4 / DeepSeek V3-style models. Sa parehong window, na-ship ang **v0.19.1** at nagpatuloy ang trabaho sa Gemma 4 + DeepSeek V3.2 + zero-bubble overlap ng speculative decoding × async scheduling.

citations.label: vLLM Blog

bullets.body: **CVE-2026-5760 (CVSS 9.8) — hindi nagbunga ng upstream fix ang patch coordination; nag-ship ang v0.5.10 nang walang SSTI hardening** — 4/27 status: hindi kasama sa SGLang 0.5.10 release ang inirerekomendang `ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment` mitigation. **Exploitable pa rin ang SGLang sa pamamagitan ng crafted GGUF chat_template + Qwen3 reranker trigger phrase laban sa `/v1/rerank`**. Tuluy-tuloy ang circulation ng PoC sa `github.com/Stuub/SGLang-0.5.9-RCE`. Active pa rin ang CERT/CC VU#915947.

citations.label: Cyberpress - Hackers Could Weaponize GGUF Models to Achieve RCE on SGLang Inference Servers

bullets.body: **Parehong vulnerability class ang dating na-patch sa vLLM (CVE-2025-61620, CVSS 6.5) noong huling bahagi ng 2025 — naa-apply na ngayon sa malawakang sukat ang copy-paste-vulnerability framing** — Inuulit-ulit ng 4/25-27 vendor coverage ito bilang **shared-template-rendering primitive** sa mga inference servers, na lalong nagpapalakas sa case ng "AI-Infra CVE sub-catalog."

citations.label: CSO Online - Copy-paste vulnerability hits AI inference frameworks at Meta, Nvidia, and Microsoft

Nag-ship ng **native AWS Bedrock support** ang Hermes Agent v0.11.0 (4/23) bilang isa sa 5 bagong inference paths — sinasara ang isang malaking adoption gap.

sections.category: AI Security > CVE / KEV / Threat Intelligence (CVSS ≥ 8.0)

bullets.body: **CVE-2026-7037 Totolink A8000RU OS Command Injection (CVSS 9.8, 4/26) — public PoC available, nima-manipulate ng remote attacker ang pptpPassThru argument** — Critical RCE sa Totolink A8000RU firmware 7.1cu.643_b20200521 na nagpapahintulot ng arbitrary OS command execution laban sa apektadong devices; publikong nakakalat ang exploit code.

citations.label: TheHackerWire - Totolink A8000RU CVE-2026-7037

bullets.body: **CVE-2026-6951 simple-git RCE (CVSS 9.8, 4/26) — foundational Node.js CI/CD dependency na exposed sa hindi mabilang na pipelines** — Critical RCE sa malawakang naka-deploy na `simple-git` Node.js library; embedded sa maraming CI/CD pipelines at developer tooling. Sinasaklaw ng TheCyberThrone ang katugmang CISA-KEV-catalog round-up sa parehong 4/20-25 disclosure window ng 31 high-priority + 19 actively exploited entries.
